Node.help: A container for a group of stats

PropertyString.name: caption
PropertyString.description: Title of the view. The title displays above the chart and on the view's tab.
PropertyString.help: Title of the view. The title displays above the chart and on the view's tab.

PropertyBoolean.name: enabled
PropertyBoolean.description: Determines whether the view is displayed or hidden. Use this option to hide views that you do not currently want to see, but do not want to delete. True means that StatViewer will display this view. False means that StatViewer will not display this view.
PropertyBoolean.help: Determines whether the view is displayed or hidden. Use this option to hide views that you do not currently want to see, but do not want to delete.

PropertyBoolean.name: useCaption
PropertyBoolean.description: Determine how the stat is going to appear in the grid view.
PropertyBoolean.help: Determine how the stat is going to appear in the grid view. If useCaption is set to true then in the grid will show up the stat caption, otherwise will show up stat name and stat source type.

PropertyBoolean.name: autoColumnWidth
PropertyBoolean.description: Determine if the column in the grid view will auto calculate width to fit the caption.
PropertyBoolean.help: Determine if the column in the grid view will auto calculate width to fit the caption.

PropertyBoolean.name: allowUserEdit
PropertyBoolean.help: Allow user edit of a stat view

PropertyDouble.name: frequency
PropertyDouble.description: Interval, in seconds, at which the view is updated with new statistics. Specify intervals from 1 to 60 seconds. Choose a value for this parameter according to the degree of resolution you want to achieve; to acheive a high degree of resolution, choose a shorter interval. To acheive a lower resolution, choose a longer interval.
PropertyDouble.help: Interval, in seconds, at which the view is updated with new statistics. Specify intervals from 1 to 60 seconds. Choose a value for this parameter according to the degree of resolution you want to achieve; to acheive a high degree of resolution, choose a shorter interval. To acheive a lower resolution, choose a longer interval.

PropertyInt.name: timeSamples
PropertyInt.description: Number of time samples buffered into each view. Specify between 1 and 32,000,000 samples. Increasing the number of time samples increases the amount of RAM required by StatViewer. Additional time samples are saved in the TestServer data store.
PropertyInt.help: Number of time samples buffered into each view. Specify between 1 and 32,000,000 samples. Increasing the number of time samples increases the amount of RAM required by StatViewer. Additional time samples are saved in the TestServer data store.

PropertyString.name: viewType
PropertyString.description: The visual display of data, represented as a chart (Line, Bar, Pie, etc) or a grid (rows and columns).
PropertyString.help: The visual display of data, represented as a chart (Line, Bar, Pie, etc) or a grid (rows and columns).

PropertyBoolean.name: showGridLines
PropertyBoolean.description: Enables or disables display of the scale division lines on charts.
PropertyBoolean.help: Enables or disables display of the scale division lines on charts.

PropertyNode.name: xAxis
PropertyNode.help: X Axis properties of a chart

PropertyNode.name: yAxis
PropertyNode.help: Y Axis properties of a chart

PropertyBoolean.name: legendEnabled
PropertyBoolean.description: Determines whether the chart legend is displayed or hidden. True means that the legend displays. False means that the legend does not display.
PropertyBoolean.help: Determines whether the chart legend is displayed or hidden.

PropertyBoolean.name: dataLegendEnabled
PropertyBoolean.description: Determines whether the chart data legend is displayed or hidden. True means that the data legend displays. False means that the data legend does not display.
PropertyBoolean.help: Determines whether the chart data legend is displayed or hidden.

PropertyString.name: legendPosition
PropertyString.description: Location where the chart legend displays.
PropertyString.help: Location where the chart legend displays.

PropertyString.name: backgroundColor
PropertyString.description: Color used for background of chart. Select a color from the drop-down list.
PropertyString.help: Color used for background of chart.

PropertyString.name: fontColor
PropertyString.description: Color used for foreground elements of chart such as the title, scales, scale divisions, and legend text. Select a color from the drop-down list
PropertyString.help: Color used for foreground elements of chart such as the title, scales, scale divisions, and legend text.

PropertyNodeList.name: statFilterGroupList
PropertyNodeList.help: List of statFilterGroups for this view

PropertyNodeList.name: statSpecList
PropertyNodeList.help: List of statSpecs for this view

PropertyBoolean.name: matrixConfiguration
PropertyBoolean.help: Each filter is applied to each statSpec in matrix configuration instead of one-to-one. The total number of stats will be statFilterList.Count x statSpecList.Count

PropertyBoolean.name: publisherLabels
PropertyBoolean.help: Whether allow applications to publish the labels displayed in the view

PropertyInt.name: threeDRotateX
PropertyInt.description: Angle to rotate 3D charts from the X Axis
PropertyInt.help: Angle to rotate 3D charts from the X Axis

PropertyInt.name: threeDRotateY
PropertyInt.description: Angle to rotate 3D charts from the Y Axis
PropertyInt.help: Angle to rotate 3D charts from the Y Axis

PropertyNodeList.help: List of stat attributes, such as color
PropertyNodeList.name: statAttributeListList

PropertyString.name: lineStyle
PropertyString.description: The style of each plotted line in a chart (Solid, Dash, Dot, etc)

PropertyNodeList.name: csvHeaderFieldList
PropertyNodeList.description: List of name value pairs to be displayed at the top of the csv file.
PropertyNodeList.help: List of name value pairs to be displayed at the top of the csv file.

PropertyNode.name: csvRequestOptions
PropertyNode.description: Use this to specify whether a csv is to be generated for the parent StatView. Other options can be set to specify that column header and various label headers should be created in the csv.
PropertyNode.help: Use this to specify whether a csv is to be generated for the parent StatView. Other options can be set to specify that column header and various label headers should be created in the csv.

PropertyBoolean.name: visible
PropertyBoolean.description: This will allow application to create a view that is not displayed in StatViewer
PropertyBoolean.help: This will allow application to create a view that is not displayed in StatViewer

PropertyBoolean.name: sampleDataRequired
PropertyBoolean.description: This will allow application to enable/disable default sample data
PropertyBoolean.help: This will allow application to enable/disable default sample data

Method2.name: MaxViewTime
Method2.help: Get the maximum time that a view will hold before dropping visible data, after this point the TestServer DataStore still contains data back to the beginning of a test

Argument.name: time
Argument.help: The maximum time that a view will hold before dropping visible data, after this point the TestServer DataStore still contains data back to the beginning of a test

Method2.name: Commit
Method2.help: After adding new stats and setting properties commit adds the new stats a live test

Method2.name: SaveAsTemplate
Method2.help: Save this view as a template in the DataStore for use in other tests

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: Save the view as a template in the DataStore with this name

Method2.name: GetStatSourceTypes
Method2.help: Concatenates all stat source types from every stat spec in this view

Argument.name: statSourceTypes
Argument.help: Concatenation all stat source types from every stat spec in this view

Method2.name: GetResultStartTime
Method2.help: Gets the starting time of a test result from the TestServer DataStore

Argument.name: time
Argument.help: The starting time of a test result from the TestServer DataStore

Method2.name: ExportCsv
Method2.help: Writes test results from the DataStore in csv format into a file on the TestServer

Argument.name: fileName
Argument.help: The name of file to write on the TestServer

Method2.name: GetStats
Method2.help: Get Stats from the DataStore on the TestServer

Argument.name: beginTimestamp
Argument.help: Relative timestamp of the begining of requested stats

Argument.name: endTimestamp
Argument.help: Relative timestamp of the end of requested stats
